turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so donna is a 37 -year-old female donna is here with complaint of headache donna has a history of hypertension and diabetes so donna tell the doctor what's going on

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah lately donna has just been having quite a bit of a headache and donna mean every now and then donna will get the headache but lately the headache has just been getting worse and donna has noticed that donna's blood pressure has been running high donna has been taking donna's blood pressure maybe like once a week but the past three weeks donna's blood pressure has been really high than usual so donna was a little worried

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: does donna remember the numbers that donna is getting on donna's blood pressure readings

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah so one of the blood pressure readings was like one sixty over eighty seven and then the last blood pressure reading was like one seventy five over ninety two

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay so donna's blood pressure is really high the doctor was looking back and the doctor saw that donna's blood pressure was pretty normal last time the doctor saw donna at one twenty four over eighty two has donna been able to take donna's blood pressure medicine, the lisinopril that donna has been prescribed

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: donna has but sometimes donna forgets donna is embarrassed to tell the doctor that but yeah sometimes donna forgets donna gets busy like especially on the weekends donna is very good during the week but on the weekends donna tends to forget lisinopril and that's when donna is most busy too

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yeah well the doctor is also curious you know donna has diabetes has donna been checking donna's blood sugar

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah donna has because donna thought maybe you know that is why donna is getting the headaches maybe donna's sugar was too low or maybe too high but donna's sugar has been okay donna's sugar has been running like one twenty sometimes donna's sugar does get down to like one hundred

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay and has donna noticed is donna urinating more than usual or anything like that

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: not really so much donna's urination has been pretty much the same but pretty normal

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay and when donna gets these headaches what is donna taking for the headaches

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: well donna takes donna's tylenol hoping tylenol will just you know go away and then tylenol does help some just for a little bit but then the headache just goes throughout the day and donna starts to get the headaches again

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay and when donna first had the headaches what would donna rate the headache at zero no pain ten the worst pain ever

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: donna would say when donna first gets the headaches the headaches are about donna would say a seven out of ten

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and then after donna takes the tylenol what does the headache go down to

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the headache goes down to probably about a four maybe five donna still feels the headache donna still feels the headache is annoying but the headache is not as pounding as the headache normally would be

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: if donna did n't take the tylenol

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yeah and has donna ever had headaches like these headaches before

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: not like these headaches you know you know as the doctor knows sometimes donna gets migraine but donna know donna never really takes anything for migraine that's like once a year or once or every two years but not like not like these headaches headaches like these headaches

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay and has donna had any congestion anything like that cough runny nose

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah donna thought maybe because you know now it's springtime and donna tends to get donna's allergies but the headache is very different and donna has not actually had any like runny nose or cough or congestion along with the headache

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay if donna taps on donna's forehead does donna have any tenderness

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: right here

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yeah

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: just a little not really too much

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay if donna taps down here on these bones donna's cheek bones any tenderness there

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: a little bit not as much as i guess if donna taps up here

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay and then if donna kinda pushes on donna's neck around here any tenderness

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: donna's neck it's a little tender but donna's neck is not it is a little bit i'd say

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay okay so donna do n't have any frontal sinus tenderness no maxillary sinus tenderness it sounds like donna do n't have any lymphadenopathy that would just be if donna's lymph nodes were tender so yeah you know let's just talk about a few things that the doctor wan na do and then the doctor wants donna to actually come in and and be seen by doctor ruth so first off donna's headache the doctor thinks taking tylenol is great donna can keep taking tylenol you know donna's lisinopril donna is on twenty milligrams once a day which is a medium dose but the doctor thinks the doctor can increase the lisinopril so for donna's hypertension and donna's headaches the doctor is gon na have donna increase donna's lisinopril to forty milligrams once a day

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and then the doctor wants donna to keep checking donna's blood pressure and the doctor wan na order some blood tests the doctor would like to get some just normal blood work the doctor will get a hemoglobin a1c some laboratory tests things like that and and then for donna's diabetes the doctor is gon na have some diabetic education for donna that the doctor wants donna to be able to review the doctor understands that donna's blood sugar has been running a little bit high and after donna gets the blood tests after the blood tests are all done the doctor wants donna to come in to see the doctor or doctor ruth and the doctor and donna will just make sure that everything is okay that the doctor gets donna's blood pressure under control any questions for the doctor

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no donna mean donna's been walking and donna know donna get the headaches but is it alright if donna still continue donna's walks

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yeah that's great the doctor thinks exercise is wonderful for everything going on go ahead and walk still

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay great donna will do that thank you

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: the doctor is welcome thanks so much donna
